tagline: Streamline change data capture with automatic handling of out-of-order records.
what_it_does: The `FLOW AUTO CDC` clause allows users to create streaming tables in Databricks SQL that automatically process change data capture (CDC) records from a source. It simplifies the handling of out-of-order records and supports both slowly changing dimensions (SCD) type 1 and type 2 without the complexity of `MERGE INTO`. Users must set the `pipelines.channel` table property to 'PREVIEW' to utilize this feature.
why_it_matters: This update significantly reduces the complexity and potential errors associated with processing CDC records, enhancing data accuracy and operational efficiency. It benefits data engineers and analysts by simplifying workflows, improving data freshness, and enabling more reliable historical tracking, which is crucial for analytics and reporting.
plain_summary: The FLOW AUTO CDC clause allows users to create streaming tables in Databricks SQL that automatically process change data capture (CDC) records from a source. It simplifies the handling of out of order records and supports both slowly changing dimensions…

capabilities.title: Automatic Out-of-Order Handling
capabilities.desc: Automatically manages out-of-order records, reducing the need for complex logic.

capabilities.title: Supports SCD Types
capabilities.desc: Allows for both SCD type 1 (direct updates) and SCD type 2 (history tracking) configurations.

capabilities.title: Flexible CDC Processing
capabilities.desc: Enables users to specify keys, sequence columns, and conditions for delete and truncate operations.

capabilities.title: Enhanced History Tracking
capabilities.desc: Provides options to track history on specific columns, improving data lineage and audit capabilities.

use_cases: Maintaining historical records for compliance and reporting
Simplifying ETL processes for CDC data
limitations: Requires streaming sources; static sources may lead to errors.
The `APPLY AS TRUNCATE WHEN` clause is only supported for SCD type 1.

steps.title: Set Table Property
steps.desc: Set the `pipelines.channel` property to 'PREVIEW' on the streaming table.

steps.title: Create Streaming Table
steps.desc: Use the `CREATE OR REFRESH STREAMING TABLE` statement with the `FLOW AUTO CDC` clause.

steps.title: Define Keys and Sequence
steps.desc: Specify the keys for identifying records and the sequence column for ordering.

steps.title: Configure SCD Type
steps.desc: Choose between SCD type 1 or type 2 for storing records.

steps.title: Implement History Tracking
steps.desc: Optionally track history on specific columns as needed.

key_takeaway: The AUTO CDC feature simplifies change data capture in Databricks SQL, enhancing data processing efficiency and accuracy.
